Amended MOTION / Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Evan Smith, Esq. (877.534.2590; esmith@brodskysmith.com) of Brodsky & Smith for Plaintiff (audio only).
William Tarantino, Esq. (415.268.7000; WTarantino@mofo.com) of Morrison & Foerster LLP for Defendant.

Hearing is held re: revisions (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964. =(302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Evan Smith, Esq. (610-667-6200; esmith@brodskysmith.com) of Brodsky & Smith for Plaintiffs.
No other appearances.

Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S Amended MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is continued to December 22, 2021 at 9:30am. Mr. Smith to file supplemental declaration with a brief explanation of what has changed over time as a result of the attorney general's comments and attaching the final form of the proposed settlement agreement by no later than Dec. 20, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
